text:

Episode 34 ISTP Love Instruction Manual What the hell is ISTP thinking? For a sweet romance with
them that was hard to understand Please read the ISTP love instruction manual. ★ This is an extremely subjectively
analyzed image. Please enjoy watching. ★ ISTP romance instruction manual for those
who have difficulty in romance with ISTP ☆ Basic functions ☆ Candidity / Independent /
Open / Efficiency / Only one person needs time ★ Unique point The point that I do
not often contact my beloved lover ★ The detailed explanation here is written in
detail on the back page, so please refer to it. 1 The beginning of love ISTP is one of the most difficult
categories to start a love affair I don't spend time on people who aren't interested I don't have many opportunities to meet diverse people. A type who prefers time with close
friends to romance with awkward people Besides, it's hard to understand because I rarely show my favorite face. When ISTP naturally includes someone in their daily lives, There is a high probability that the other person will like it. I don't really notice the other person's liking Tug of war is prohibited because you don't
notice the other person's good feelings ☆ The tug of war is just pushed A type that focuses on visible actions and information. I'm convinced that I don't like it when I act vaguely, so I don't spend time. The tug of war is meaningless to ISTP. 2 romance conflicts 1. Daily sharing It means that if ISTP takes the time
to meet, the other person will like it. I don't know if you love me. ??? Love in itself if ISTP
spends money and time ISTP thinks it's a waste of time to
schedule with people who aren't interested ISTP expresses affection by focusing only
on the lover when you are with the lover. Emails have been coming all the time. It's not a big deal ~. ISTP is similar to a cactus. Cacti can rot if given a lot of water If you want a lot of interest and affection for ISTP, you may get tired. You will find that ISTP is more attractive
in a naturally flowing situation. Over-watering can be harmful to cacti When the cactus grows, it also gives water every week. ISTP also expresses more interest and affection during the period of love growth.

ISTP also expresses more interest and affection during the period of love growth. But if it becomes established as one of everyday life I just feel more affection from my usual comfort. 2. Respect for private life ISTP wants to ensure that there is ample personal time and space. I also need time to be alone ~ Much more necessary than I expected I can afford it. How about setting
the schedule for next week in advance? Hard schedule and difficult to control Time with my lover is good, but I
definitely need time for one person In the early days of love, I prefer to gradually increase the communal time. When the color of the cactus changes, it is better to improve ventilation and reduce watering. ISTPs who don't have enough
time for one person will look tired. At that time, it is better to reduce interest and give freedom. Cacti that enter the dormant period in
winter will be given water only once a month. Like a cactus that blooms (in other
seasons) throughout the dormant period If you understand the time of only one person in ISTP, you can have an easy romance. 3. Number of contacts Don't you care what I'm doing?
Why don't you contact me so much? ISTP doesn't often contact his beloved lover. Hmm...
I'll contact you a lot. .. Only to contact the lover specially first I'm already away from work ~ I'm tired ~ Take a rest ~! yes! I have to drink chicken and beer. ♡ ISTP doesn't reply very often? It's likely because you think you're done. Do you love me ??? Please contact me once a day. Ah.... ISTP pursues a reliable relationship that respects
each other rather than the number of contacts Is it so hard to contact you once a day? Oh, I forgot. I'm trying to get in touch with you Feel like a business if you want more contact There is no meaning in love. Please
note that you may come to think about it ☆ Cacti have a habit of absorbing and storing water with thorns. Since the environment is different for each house, watering is better than setting a date. It is good to decide the amount of water by looking at the condition of the cactus. ISTPs should be spaced at some intervals rather than contacted too often. If you have a cleaner, don't clean it ~ What do you think the team leader will say not to do it again? I think it's clean and clean with a contractor.
Pretend to clean and take a break ~. It ’s difficult to comfort yourself, but ISTPs, who are strong in solving everyday problems, can offer efficient solutions. yes? This charger. Didn't you
give it to your former girlfriend? Ah ~ That's right. How can I still use this? There is a high probability that ISTP is used without thinking. The charger is innocent. Didn't you think I was feeling sick? ISTP makes it difficult to express emotions and thoughts Why don't you talk A type that doesn't talk when you feel sick or have a hard time Be careful as it may worsen if you try to force the end ☆ You should give it time. I didn't think this would make me feel uncomfortable. You may think that it is unfriendly because of poor emotional expression. He has a lot of worries and makes a lot of efforts for his lover. What the hell am I to you? yes? Did you fight with your best friend? Why didn't you tell me? You didn't even know what was frustrating I can feel loneliness because I don't really talk about my love with ISTP. Ah ~ Just that child was strange. ISTP doesn't really feel the need to tell his story. What's the matter That kid is... no big deal. I find it cumbersome to explain If she concludes that it's already over Even if I confess, I may omit the way of
speaking unless it seems to be particularly good Where did you go yesterday? yesterday? Where did you go... Less important things are often unthinkable. Why don't you talk about you? I won't tell you if you don't ask. what? What did you do and what did you
eat today? Even such a trivial matter... ISTP thinks, "Why do
you care about this?" If you want to talk a lot with ISTP, we recommend talking on different themes. If you have a theme that you are interested in or a story that suddenly comes to your mind, I think you will start talking happily. ISTP can dry out as soon as emotional conflict occurs. text:
me that you are interested in or a story that suddenly comes to your mind, I think you will start talking happily. ISTP can dry out as soon as emotional conflict occurs. Frequent watering of cacti that lacks sunlight can cause root rot. You can feel pressure if you demand emotional empathy and sharing. Be careful not to get stuck in the thorns. Cacti like sunlight, but they can die in the strong sunlight. Even if ISTP knows that the other person will be more considerate It is a type that you can love but leave when a hard moment comes. Five. Meaning of words One of the words ISTP often says "It looks like that" The meaning of the word is
often premised on "not me" ISTP does not try to change the other party. The most open and
"difference" type of all MBTI types Where should we go today? I want to go ~ What do you eat what do you want to eat? Try to match your lover as much as possible Let's go to the escape game cafe! Sometimes I want to go
somewhere or do something. In such a case, you should definitely give it together. Let's eat chicken today! I wanted to eat pizza!
Alright! Today is chicken! !! Cacti that like the sun will lean towards it in search of light ISTP is a type that fits everything for a lover, If you request something, you really want to do it Please give me a little. 6. Anxiety points ISTP is a type of observing a lover because he lacks empathy. You can quickly detect the chilling of your lover's love. If you decide that you can't solve it in words In many cases, unpleasant feelings are not expressed in words. Sometimes I give up when I start to get scared and there is no way to get it back. ISTP is a person who feels oppressive when in love. I feel like I've been away lately. If you keep a distance without any problems You can also decide that you like it very much but need to organize your relationship It is sometimes misunderstood that feeling anxious due to growing emotions is an inconvenient situation. A type that does not show up but nurtures love in the heart. Shows thorns to protect themselves, If you find that parting is more difficult, you will concentrate on your lover. 7. Unexpected appearance Are you at home today? Because it's a holiday ~ I have to go out because it's a holiday! Just ISTP seems to be a hassle, Let's go to the horror house! What that? I'm sorry ㅠㅠ I got on the bus and fell
asleep and got off at a strange place ㅠㅠ ISTP is easy to understand if you are convinced even in an angry situation. Ah ~ I am really sorry Please come in time from now on. I am really sorry. thank
you I love you. I love you I can't say anything unpleasant to someone who likes it. ISTP, which is difficult to express affection, likes people who express it. I too ~ you are the best. ISTP is a straightforward and straightforward expression that doesn't distract your favorite people. They also like people who express their emotions well and express exactly what they want. It looks grumpy, but cacti aren't too difficult to manage. It can be grown in sunny and well-ventilated sunlight. It's not easy to start in love, but once you fall in love, an ISTP that is loyal to your lover If freedom and time for one person are guaranteed, I think we can have a stable romance. 3 ISTP warranty Cactus as simple and straightforward as ISTP (x) There is no person (o). ISTP ☆ who has difficulty expressing emotions by
himself, but does his best to his favorite person I think you can feel a sense of calm and stability in your love affair with ISTP. I think there are days when I'm worried because there aren't many expressions. Love a lot of the special charms of ISTP, where
you have little to worry about having an affair. ☆ I thought ISTP's romance was very difficult, There are more appearances that overlap with cacti than I
expected, so I made her ISTP romance instruction manual. It was analyzed from the subjective point of view of a certain INTJ. Have fun watching because
not everyone is ah. ☆ MBTI propensity type does not determine taste and personality. Bad personalities and bad personalities can exist in any type of MBTI. Just because you meet a bad person doesn't mean that everyone with that type of MBTI is a bad person. Impatient prejudice and generalization can hurt everyone. Please enjoy watching.
